title: Create: CoinCraft
description: Adds Create Numismatics money recipes and wallet.
body:
# 🪙 Create: CoinCraft

Create: CoinCraft is a specialized integration addon that adds a few crafts for [Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics). Now you can make a balanced economy on your server!
## ⚙️ Features:

This addon introduces balanced and immersive recipes designed to make your economic progression feel like a part of the Create ecosystem:

- Industrial Minting: Coins and Bevels can now be produced using Create’s Pressing, Rolling, and Mechanical Crafting methods.

- Smart Tag Integration: The mod automatically detects the presence of zinc plates (#c:plates/zinc). If you have Create Crafts & Additions or any mod adding zinc plates, the mod will prioritize more efficient, plate-based recipes.

- Currency Recycling: Melt down your spare coins into valuable resources. Using the Mechanical Mixer with a heat requirement, you can recycle currency back into Gold Nuggets or even Netherite Scraps.

- Balanced Progression: Custom recipes for economic components like Spurs and Cogs, designed to feel "Vanilla+" and integrated.

- Money Pouch: It is a bundle but for money. You can put your coins an withdraw from pouch.

## 🔨 Crafts:

### Crafting Coins:

I didnt add recipes directly from farmable materials but you can make material from coins like:
- Spur <-> Copper
- Bevel <-> Zinc
- Sprocket -> Iron
- Cog <-> Brass
- Crown -> Gold
- Sun <-> Netherite Scrap

## 💰 Money Pouch:

This mod adds a new item to the game. Are you bored for exchanging your money with placing bank terminal? Now you can carry your money on inventory with a lower space (It's like self-hosting but for your money)

#### Pouch on inventory
![Pouch inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ffcabcee5da2eb277e725188a612142d030261f.png)
#### Pouch UI
![Pouch Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/772501d404e494cd57ae30ce7debe3b879f76694.png)


## 🛠️ Dependencies:

To run this mod, the following are required:

[Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create): v0.6.1 or newer.

[Create: Numismatics](https://modrinth.com/mod/numismatics): Any version.

## 🌟 Recommended Addons:
[ Create Crafts & Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/createaddition): Recommended to unlock the specialized Zinc Plate recipes. Compatible with any mod that provides items under the #c:plates/zinc tag.

## 🤔 Why CoinCraft?

Whether you are running a multiplayer server or a single-player world, money shouldn't just appear out of thin air. CoinCraft allows you to build massive, clanking minting facilities, making your wealth feel earned through engineering. It respects game balance while providing the automation paths that every Create engineer loves.
